name: Lateral Deltoid (Side Delt)

landmarks.notes: Receives little effective indirect work, tolerates high direct volume, and is a common priority for width. The 24-26 MRV is extrapolated beyond the volumes actually tested in the cited dose-response work; Enes 2024 suggests hypertrophy gains largely plateau by ~20 sets/wk, so treat this ceiling as an untested upper-bound estimate.

frequency_notes: Responds well to high frequency (2-4x/week) of lateral raise variations.
training_notes: Lateral raises (dumbbell and cable) are the staple. The top of the raise adds little tension; cables/lean-away variations load the lengthened position better.
